title: crotalaria ruspoliana
intro: Crotalaria ruspoliana, also known as Ruspolia or Karamoyo, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which contribute to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and relieving congestion. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria ruspoliana is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its therapeutic potential.
